browser_payload_boundary: ui_action plus bounded structured payload only

stale_id_reconciliation.resolution: old setup passport superseded by final package setup wizard id
old select-client passport superseded by final package client selection id
old import passport superseded by final package import wizard id
old account screen id reconciled to final accounts table id; account detail drawer is separate 03 screen
current diagnostics surface maps to signal detail; live history/export result remain separate partial/admission items

screens.title: Brand lockup
screens.subtitle: System cover
screens.implementation_note: Identity/token reference only; no runtime behavior.

screens.title: Обзор
screens.subtitle: Состояние локального прокси, клиента Codex и пула аккаунтов.
screens.implementation_note: Core overview surface exists and is visually transferred.

screens.title: Аккаунты
screens.subtitle: Пул аккаунтов, статусы проверки и распределение по режимам.
screens.implementation_note: Accounts table and lifecycle action gates exist.

screens.title: Аккаунты
screens.subtitle: Детали выбранного аккаунта открываются как drawer без потери контекста таблицы.
screens.implementation_note: Data/actions exist on accounts table; final detail drawer itself is not implemented.

screens.title: Диагностика
screens.subtitle: Список сигналов слева, подробности выбранного объекта справа.
screens.implementation_note: Diagnostics master/detail and chart/result regions exist, with fixture-only history where live history is deferred.

screens.title: Журнал диагностики
screens.subtitle: Детальная шкала событий строится только из bounded JSON history packet.
truth_sources: future bounded diagnostics history JSON packet
screens.implementation_note: Live history visualization requires a bounded history packet; raw logs are forbidden.

screens.title: Экспорт диагностики
screens.subtitle: Результат support bundle не является runtime health truth.
screens.implementation_note: Export result details exist in diagnostics/action result regions; final standalone result composition remains incomplete.

screens.title: Command ledger
screens.subtitle: Единая панель последних действий и результатов команд.
screens.implementation_note: Current action panel normalizes last result; full ledger/history screen is not implemented.

screens.title: Ошибка интеграции
screens.subtitle: Системные ошибки показываются как явные состояния, а не случайный текст.
screens.implementation_note: Integration failure and stale/error state surfaces are represented.

screens.title: Добавление аккаунта
screens.subtitle: Result flow после onboarding: reserve-first, без auto-promote.
screens.implementation_note: Reserve-first modal states are implemented; standalone result screen is not.

screens.title: Первичная настройка
screens.subtitle: Безопасная подготовка локального контура без прямых файловых операций из web UI.
screens.implementation_note: Visual shell exists and remains inert; setup readiness is not claimed.

screens.title: Выбор клиента
screens.subtitle: Клиент выбирается только из command-owned candidates.
screens.implementation_note: Visual shell exists and remains inert; candidate discovery/selection is not admitted.

screens.title: Импорт существующей настройки
screens.subtitle: Legacy setup импортируется как транзакционный wizard с preview и rollback semantics.
screens.implementation_note: Visual shell exists and remains inert; import execution is not admitted.

screens.title: Installer / Data layout
screens.subtitle: Инициализация данных и permissions как отдельный setup/settings subflow.
screens.implementation_note: Installer/data layout implies local path/native filesystem mediation and must wait for desktop admission/command contract.

screens.title: Настройки
screens.subtitle: Hub настроек: Runtime, Client, Accounts, API routes, Diagnostics, Security, Advanced, About.
screens.implementation_note: Settings hub exists as readonly plus safe actions/deferred controls.

screens.title: Runtime / Mode
screens.subtitle: Mode preferences с preflight, apply result и disabled states.
screens.implementation_note: Runtime mode controls are present inside settings hub; dedicated sub-screen not implemented.

screens.title: Client / Launch
screens.subtitle: client path/status, launch preconditions и bounded launch dispatch.
truth_sources: launch client dispatch metadata and ui_action
screens.implementation_note: Launch client action is bounded dispatch; selection/path configuration remains deferred.

screens.title: Accounts policy
screens.subtitle: Отображение meanings и policy без direct config write.
screens.implementation_note: Policy/pool state is visible through account surfaces; policy mutation is not admitted.

screens.title: Diagnostics / Privacy
screens.subtitle: Правила diagnostics export, redaction и support bundle location.
screens.implementation_note: Diagnostics/privacy copy and export action exist; privacy sub-screen is not implemented.

screens.title: Advanced
screens.subtitle: Developer/operator surfaces and deferred dangerous actions.
screens.implementation_note: Advanced settings are visible as deferred readonly controls only.

screens.title: API-подключения
screens.subtitle: Route registry summary без raw config editor.
screens.implementation_note: API routes list exists with bounded safe route actions.

screens.title: Route detail
screens.subtitle: Route id, provider, model, secret_ref status и safe actions.
truth_sources: future/read-only route detail packet or existing profile packet
screens.implementation_note: Route detail needs explicit readonly packet boundary before implementation.

screens.title: Remove disabled route
screens.subtitle: Strong confirmation, disabled preflight, result, changed files.
screens.implementation_note: Disabled-route removal confirmation/copy is bounded and implemented.

screens.title: Route builder draft
screens.subtitle: Deferred дизайн create/update route через bounded builder.
screens.implementation_note: Design presence does not admit route create/update or raw route config editing.

screens.title: Secret references
screens.subtitle: Выбор/проверка secret_ref без ввода или показа secret value.
screens.implementation_note: Design presence does not admit secret selection, token entry, or secret manager behavior.

screens.title: Human-open diagnostics
screens.subtitle: Открытие файлов/папок только как bounded human-open action.
screens.implementation_note: Opening support locations/actions requires server-owned bounded references; browser arbitrary paths are forbidden.

screens.title: Runtime attestation
screens.subtitle: Listener/models/responses/effective-mode/base-url checks with observed_at and stale status.
screens.implementation_note: Runtime attestation cannot be claimed without bounded JSON attestation packet.

screens.title: Recovery center
screens.subtitle: Stable repair dry-run/apply, target status, repair plan, apply result, rollback notes.
screens.implementation_note: Dry-run planning exists; apply-like recovery center actions remain deferred/admission-required.

screens.title: Rollout / Scale gate
screens.subtitle: Stage prove/advance evidence requirements, deferred advanced mode only.
screens.implementation_note: Rollout scale gate cannot imply stage proof, scale readiness, pilot readiness, or rollout advancement from design.

screens.title: Evidence packets
screens.subtitle: Read-only/support view of evidence packets and redaction status.
truth_sources: api route evidence command packet metadata only
screens.implementation_note: Evidence packet screen cannot directly read evidence files; needs bounded evidence index/packet contract.

screens.title: Audit / Activity history
screens.subtitle: Operator actions, command packet summary, failure states, no secrets, no raw logs as truth.
screens.implementation_note: Activity history needs bounded JSON activity packet; raw logs are forbidden.

screens.title: About
screens.subtitle: Версии, лицензия, schema/build channel and support links.
screens.implementation_note: About/license/version can be readonly later; no current runtime behavior admitted.

screens.title: State surfaces
screens.subtitle: Обязательные плашки и состояния для всех экранов.
screens.implementation_note: Component library only; informs state styling, not runtime truth.

screens.title: Dropdowns / Popovers
screens.subtitle: Выпадашки, menus, filters и contextual row actions.
screens.implementation_note: Component library only; no action/dropdown behavior admitted.

screens.title: Modals / Confirmations
screens.subtitle: Destructive, irreversible, missing surface and permission confirmations.
screens.implementation_note: Confirmation and onboarding modal library has been transferred to current modal surfaces.
